A_value: ofam3 is a near-global, eddy-resolving ocean general circulation model based on the modular ocean model mom4p1 . it simulates physical ocean dynamics, circulation, temperature, salinity, mesoscale variability, coupled with a biogeochemical model wombat .; defines model grid, vertical resolution, viscosity, mixing scheme, restoring timescales
B_value: wombat is a three-dimensional npzd-type ocean biogeochemistry model, including nutrients, phytoplankton, zooplankton, detritus, extensions for carbon, oxygen, iron cycles. it is designed to simulate large-scale biogeochemical cycling, ecosystem responses when coupled to ocean circulation models.; defines ecosystem constants uptake rates, remineralization rates, stoichiometric ratios
AB_value: two-way coupled sea-ice-ocean system on the orca2 tripolar grid 78°s-90°n, ~2° mean resolution , evaluating high-latitude processes, sea-ice variability, ocean circulation under combined reanalysis / climatology forcing.; ice-ocean interface exchange, schedule; atmospheric, surface boundary conditions; january phc fields for ocean t / s, initial sea-ice, snow thickness specified by hemisphere.; ncep / ncar daily + monthly climatologies, river runoff, used for two 23-yr passes spin-up + analysis .
